page: Microsoft Azure NV8ads_V710_v5 is a virtual machine instance powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 8 dedicated vCPUs and 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

The instance incorporates a fractional GPU configuration, providing approximately one-third of an AMD Radeon PRO V710 GPU with 7 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is bundled, offering 550 GB of local disk capacity, and the instance is premium storage capable. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included.

The fractional GPU allocation offers a cost-efficient entry point for workloads requiring GPU acceleration without the expense of a full dedicated GPU. This resource density makes the instance suitable for entry-level virtual desktops, hardware-accelerated graphics rendering, and light machine learning inference tasks that benefit from dedicated GPU resources but do not saturate a full accelerator.
description: Microsoft Azure NV8ads_V710_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine instance built on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and powered by an AMD processor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs, 32.0 GB of system memory, and a bundled 550 GB local disk with premium storage capabilities. A key characteristic of this instance is its fractional GPU configuration, which provides 0.3333 of an AMD Radeon PRO V710 GPU with 7 GB of dedicated VRAM. This resource allocation offers a cost-efficient option for workloads that require GPU acceleration but do not demand a full physical GPU. The instance is designed for tasks such as virtual desktop infrastructure, accelerated graphics rendering, and light machine learning inference.
